---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new template or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Is this a new template or an improvement to an existing one?**
[ ] New template
[ ] Improvement to existing template

**Describe the feature**
What do you want?

**Use case**
Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

**Alternatives considered**
Have you tried other approaches?

**Additional context**
Any other details, mockups, or examples.
